column1: This hotel was absolutely amazing and the staff treated us like royalty.
Worst experience ever. The room was dirty and customer service was terrible.
I highly recommend this hotel for business travelers visiting Chicago.
The hotel looked nice in pictures but the service was disappointing.
The location was perfect and everything was within walking distance.
BUY THIS HOTEL NOW!!! BEST EXPERIENCE EVER!!!
The bed was uncomfortable and the air conditioning did not work properly.
We had a wonderful stay and will definitely come back again.
The staff seemed fake and overly enthusiastic about everything.
